## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss feedback on recent events, follow-up actions, and plan future events for Surge AI.](https://fathom.video/share/zPxHZmhkpBhVf9KYzrqD3hYoYzdGMByt?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Recent SF events were successful, but improvements needed in venue selection, capacity planning, and attendee management](https://fathom.video/share/zPxHZmhkpBhVf9KYzrqD3hYoYzdGMByt?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Future events to focus on co-hosting with high-profile partners to attract more influential attendees](https://fathom.video/share/zPxHZmhkpBhVf9KYzrqD3hYoYzdGMByt?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Seattle event planned for late Oct/early Nov; GrowthX to assist with planning but likely not attend](https://fathom.video/share/zPxHZmhkpBhVf9KYzrqD3hYoYzdGMByt?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
  - [Need to develop a playbook for organizing exclusive, high-impact dinners and events](https://fathom.video/share/zPxHZmhkpBhVf9KYzrqD3hYoYzdGMByt?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)

## Topics

### Recent Event Feedback

  - [Share rate of 55% lower than expected; future events to double capacity](https://fathom.video/share/zPxHZmhkpBhVf9KYzrqD3hYoYzdGMByt?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Venue issues: lack of shade, projector confusion, guest list discrepancies](https://fathom.video/share/zPxHZmhkpBhVf9KYzrqD3hYoYzdGMByt?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Suggestions: book entire space, improve ergonomics, tighten logistics](https://fathom.video/share/zPxHZmhkpBhVf9KYzrqD3hYoYzdGMByt?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Branding improvements: more screens/banners, personalized name tags](https://fathom.video/share/zPxHZmhkpBhVf9KYzrqD3hYoYzdGMByt?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)

### Attendee Management

  - [Develop robust system for targeting and engaging key attendees](https://fathom.video/share/zPxHZmhkpBhVf9KYzrqD3hYoYzdGMByt?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Utilize CRM (managed by Helena) to track and brief team on important guests](https://fathom.video/share/zPxHZmhkpBhVf9KYzrqD3hYoYzdGMByt?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Improve location-specific targeting for invites](https://fathom.video/share/zPxHZmhkpBhVf9KYzrqD3hYoYzdGMByt?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [Personalize outreach by having team members contact relevant networks](https://fathom.video/share/zPxHZmhkpBhVf9KYzrqD3hYoYzdGMByt?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)

### Future Events Planning

  - [Seattle event planned for late Oct/early Nov; Sully to scout venues](https://fathom.video/share/zPxHZmhkpBhVf9KYzrqD3hYoYzdGMByt?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
  - [GrowthX to assist with planning, provide branding materials](https://fathom.video/share/zPxHZmhkpBhVf9KYzrqD3hYoYzdGMByt?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
  - [Consider expanding to other cities: Boston, LA, London, Paris](https://fathom.video/share/zPxHZmhkpBhVf9KYzrqD3hYoYzdGMByt?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)
  - [Develop system for co-hosting with high-profile partners (e.g., Cursor)](https://fathom.video/share/zPxHZmhkpBhVf9KYzrqD3hYoYzdGMByt?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)

### High-Impact Dinner Strategy

  - [Aim to create "daisy chain" effect of influential attendees](https://fathom.video/share/zPxHZmhkpBhVf9KYzrqD3hYoYzdGMByt?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)
  - [Explore upscale options: renting mansions, hiring private chefs](https://fathom.video/share/zPxHZmhkpBhVf9KYzrqD3hYoYzdGMByt?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Map influencers and build relationships strategically](https://fathom.video/share/zPxHZmhkpBhVf9KYzrqD3hYoYzdGMByt?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [Goal: attract very high-profile guests (e.g., Ilya from OpenAI)](https://fathom.video/share/zPxHZmhkpBhVf9KYzrqD3hYoYzdGMByt?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)
